query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: Two silhouetted figures stand at the base of a towering, horizontally stratified rock wall that curves across the background. The stone displays prominent layered bands, and a faint carved or painted marking is visible on the upper-central portion of the cliff face. The figures appear as dark, featureless shapes against the lighter stone, and the foreground consists of rough, sloping ground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Two heavily blurred, silhouetted figures dissolve into a grainy, sepia-toned scene at the base of a massive stratified rock wall. Dense analog film grain and intentional soft focus obliterate fine detail, rendering the stone surfaces and human forms as smeared, indistinct shapes without clear texture or edges. The muted, washed-out brown palette and dreamlike haze create a melancholic, uneasy atmosphere, while a faint primitive marking on the cliff face barely emerges through the degraded, low-definition surface.
